name: xdm_browser_security_diagnostics_overlay
description: Adds least-privilege browser permissions, per-site capture modes, pending confirmation, native-host identity/version checks, authenticated extension health, and a diagnostics workbench.
commitMessage: Harden browser integration security and diagnostics
constraints: Apply on top of commit aee5671
Require zero warnings and zero errors
Preserve acknowledged download takeover and explicit context-menu capture
Do not require cookie, webRequest, or broad host access for URL-only takeover
Do not capture private/incognito downloads unless explicitly enabled
Do not expose the browser loopback authentication token
